# Inspector

## Inspector

- [Introduction](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/master.md): Welcome to the Inspector developer documentation.
- [Metrics](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/metrics.md): How metrics are calculated and presented in the dashboard.
- [Notification Channels](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/notifications.md): Routes important alerts to your preferred communication services.
- [Email](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/notifications/email-channel.md): Send notifications to the users email addresses.
- [Slack](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/notifications/slack-channel.md): Send notifications to your Slack workspace.
- [Telegram](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/notifications/telegram.md): Send notifications to Telegram users.
- [Microsoft Teams](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/notifications/microsoft-teams.md): Send notifications to Microsoft Teams channels.
- [Google Chat](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/notifications/google-chat.md): Send notifications to your Google Chat space.
- [Webhook](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/notifications/webhook-channel.md): Send http POST requests to specified endpoints.
- [Discord](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/notifications/discord.md): Send notifications to your Discord channel.
- [Pushover](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/notifications/pushover.md): Send notifications to your Pushover mobile application.
- [PagerDuty](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/notifications/pagerduty.md): Send notifications to your PagerDuty service.
- [Twilio - SMS](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/notifications/twilio-sms.md): Send SMS notifications through your Twilio account.
- [Filtering Syntax](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/filtering-syntax.md): Apply filters with an intuitive, human-friendly search.
- [Alerts](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/alerts.md): Create alerts to monitor your application processes.
- [Grouping Patterns](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/grouping-patterns.md): How to customize the transactions and errors grouping strategy
- [Custom Segments](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/custom-segments.md): Monitor custom code blocks inside your application.
- [Billing](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/billing.md): Inspector pricing was designed for transparency and scalability.
- [AI Bug Fix](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/ai-bug-fix.md): Real-Time bug fix proposals to immediately get solutions from emerging errors.
- [MCP Server](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/mcp-server.md): Let AI coding agents access your application monitoring data to help them debug your application.
- [Agentic Integration](https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/agentic-integration.md): Connect the documentation to coding agents for AI Assisted Development
- [Access control](https://docs.inspector.dev/security-and-access/permissions.md): Explore roles, permissions, and access control options at an organization and application level.
- [Two-factor authentication](https://docs.inspector.dev/security-and-access/two-factor-authentication.md): Enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) to keep your Inspector account secure.
- [PHP](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/raw-php.md): Code Execution Monitoring for PHP scripts and applications.
- [Installation & Set Up](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/raw-php/installation.md): Connect your application with Inspector.
- [Custom Segments](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/raw-php/custom-segments.md): Monitor custom code blocks inside your application.
- [Exceptions Monitoring](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/raw-php/exceptions-monitoring.md): Catch a real-time diagnosis of your application's exceptions.
- [Configuration](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/raw-php/configuration.md): Customize the package behaviour.
- [Laravel / Lumen](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/laravel.md): Code Execution Monitoring for Laravel applications.
- [Upgrade Guide](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/laravel/upgrade-guide.md): Upgrading to 4.0 from 2.x or 3.x
- [Installation & Set-up](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/laravel/installation.md): Connect your Laravel application with Inspector.
- [Http Requests Monitoring](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/laravel/http-requests-monitoring.md): Monitor your application behaviour during incoming http requests.
- [Configuration](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/laravel/configuration.md): Customize the monitoring strategy in your Laravel application.
- [Exception Monitoring](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/laravel/exception-monitoring.md): Laravel error tracking
- [Livewire](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/laravel/livewire.md): Monitor Livewire components execution and state
- [Laravel Vapor](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/laravel/laravel-vapor.md): How to make Inspector works on Laravel Vapor.
- [Laravel Octane](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/laravel/laravel-octane.md): Monitor a Laravel application served by Octane
- [Laravel Nova Tool](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/laravel/laravel-nova-tool.md): Direct link to the Inspector dashboard in your Laravel Nova administration panel.
- [Group by service name](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/laravel/group-by-service-name.md): Monitor your Laravel application by service name instead of single hostname.
- [Symfony](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/symfony.md): Code Execution Monitoring for Symfony applications.
- [Installation](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/symfony/installation.md): Connect your Symfony application to Inspector.
- [Configuration](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/symfony/configuration.md): Customize the monitoring strategy in your Symfony application.
- [Exception Monitoring](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/symfony/exception-monitoring.md): Symfony error tracking
- [Tempest](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/tempest.md): Code Execution Monitoring for Tempest applications
- [CodeIgniter](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/codeigniter.md): Code Execution Monitoring for CodeIgniter applications.
- [Installation](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/codeigniter/installation.md): How to connect your CodeIgniter application to Inspector.
- [Configuration](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/codeigniter/configuration.md): Fine tune the CodeInginter monitoring strategy on your needs.
- [Exception Monitoring](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/codeigniter/exception-monitoring.md): CodeIgniter error tracking
- [Drupal](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/drupal.md): Connect Drupal instances to the Inspector monitoring dashboard.
- [Slim](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/slim.md): Code Execution Monitoring for Slim based applications.
- [Neuron AI](https://docs.inspector.dev/guides/neuron-ai.md): Monitor your AI Agents, RAGs, and Workflows in real-time.
- [Authentication](https://docs.inspector.dev/rest-api/authentication.md)
- [Apps](https://docs.inspector.dev/rest-api/application.md): Create and retrieve Projects is needed to get the ingestion key.
- [Platforms](https://docs.inspector.dev/rest-api/platform.md)
- [Transactions](https://docs.inspector.dev/rest-api/transactions.md): Access transactions metrics.
- [Segments](https://docs.inspector.dev/rest-api/segments.md): Access Segments metrics
- [Analytics](https://docs.inspector.dev/rest-api/analytics.md)


---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.inspector.dev/concepts/master.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
